meaning: adj.烦恼的,麻烦的,讨厌的adv.极端
examples: All you have to do is to control those pesky gag reflexes and drop the sword.
He was a pesky tourist asking silly questions.
The image of a man being slurped on a moving toboggan by a pesky dog is too cartoonishly good to be true.
Balloons can work but are time-consuming, and they are slaves to wind and pesky guide wires.
Now I want you to think about one of those pesky, sometimes difficult to manage applications.
